title: angelica shikokiana
intro: Angelica shikokiana, also known as Japanese angelica, is a perennial plant native to Japan, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Its medicinal properties include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Angelica shikokiana include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
